name: Naglfar, Generaider Boss of Fire
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほのお</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ジェネレイド</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ナグルファー
desc: You can only control 1 "Naglfar, Generaider Boss of Fire". If a card(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can destroy 1 "Generaider" monster or 1 Beast-Warrior monster you control instead. You can only use this effect of "Naglfar, Generaider Boss of Fire" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can only control 1 "Naglfar, Generaider Boss of Fire". If a card(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can destroy 1 "Generaider" monster or 1 Beast-Warrior monster you control instead. You can only use this effect of "Naglfar, Generaider Boss of Fire" once per turn.
eff: You can only control 1 "Naglfar, Generaider Boss of Fire". If a card(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can destroy 1 "Generaider" monster or 1 Beast-Warrior monster you control instead. mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
